# Kabbalah Circle

> Free Kabbalistic Astrology readings. Discover your Soul's Shadow patterns (Gilgul), your spiritual work (Tikkun), and your daily mantra (Kavanah) — rooted in the Sefer Yetzirah and the Zohar.

Kabbalah Circle is an independent project sharing Kabbalistic Astrology. A Tikkun is the soul-level correction a person is here to make in this lifetime — the work of transforming reactive Shadow patterns (Gilgulim) carried over from past lives into purposeful action. Visitors receive a free Tikkun chart based on the lunar nodes at their date of birth.

## Key concepts

- **Tikkun**: the soul-level correction or spiritual work a person is here to perform in this lifetime.
- **Tikkun Olam**: the broader work of repairing the world by fulfilling one's personal Tikkun.
- **Gilgul / Gilgulim**: reincarnation — the default reactive patterns ("baggage") a soul carries from past lifetimes.
- **Kavanah**: focused intention; a daily mantra used to restrict ego and direct one's actions toward the Tikkun.
- **Mazalot**: celestial constellations whose influence Kabbalists acknowledge while rejecting fatalistic prediction — free will overrides fate.
- **Kabbalistic Astrology**: the system of reading the soul's purpose from the lunar nodes and Hebrew letters, dating back to Abraham the Patriarch in the Sefer Yetzirah.

## Pages

- [Home](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/): Free Kabbalistic Astrology reading from your date of birth — spin the Tikkun wheel and reveal your soul's purpose patterns.
- [A Brief History of Kabbalah Astrology](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/history): The origins of Kabbalistic Astrology in the Sefer Yetzirah, the Zohar, and the Talmud — and how free will overrides celestial influence.
- [Kabbalistic Astrology: History, Glossary & Timeline](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/kabbalistic-astrology): Long-form guide to Chokhmat HaMazalot — interactive timeline from Abraham and Sefer Yetzirah through ibn Ezra, the Zohar, the Arizal, Baal HaSulam and Aryeh Kaplan, plus letter/planet/zodiac mappings and a searchable glossary.
- [About](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/about): About Marc and the Kabbalah Circle project.
- [Privacy Policy](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/privacy): How user data is collected, used, and protected.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/terms): Terms for using the free reading service.

## The 12 Tikkunim (by zodiac sign)

- [The 12 Tikkunim — overview](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun): The twelve Kabbalistic soul corrections, one per zodiac sign, drawn from the lunar nodes and the Hebrew letters of the Sefer Yetzirah.
- [Tikkun for Aries](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/aries): Soul correction from Libran people-pleasing and indecision toward Aries leadership, courage, and direct action.
- [Tikkun for Taurus](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/taurus): Soul correction from Scorpio intensity and dependency toward Taurean self-worth, simplicity, and steady values.
- [Tikkun for Gemini](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/gemini): Soul correction from Sagittarian certainty toward Gemini curiosity, listening, and present-moment communication.
- [Tikkun for Cancer](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/cancer): Soul correction from Capricornian control and over-responsibility toward Cancerian emotional honesty and nurture.
- [Tikkun for Leo](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/leo): Soul correction from Aquarian detachment toward Leonine heart-centered creativity and personal expression.
- [Tikkun for Virgo](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/virgo): Soul correction from Piscean escapism toward Virgoan discernment, service, and grounded daily practice.
- [Tikkun for Libra](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/libra): Soul correction from Arian self-orientation toward Libran partnership, fairness, and considered cooperation.
- [Tikkun for Scorpio](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/scorpio): Soul correction from Taurean material attachment toward Scorpionic transformation, depth, and surrender.
- [Tikkun for Sagittarius](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/sagittarius): Soul correction from Geminian scattered curiosity toward Sagittarian vision, faith, and meaning.
- [Tikkun for Capricorn](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/capricorn): Soul correction from Cancerian emotional reactivity toward Capricornian responsibility, structure, and mature authority.
- [Tikkun for Aquarius](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/aquarius): Soul correction from Leonine ego-centered drama toward Aquarian community, vision, and humanitarian work.
- [Tikkun for Pisces](https://tikkun.kabbalahcircle.com/tikkun/pisces): Soul correction from Virgoan over-analysis and worry toward Piscean compassion, surrender, and intuitive trust.
